query: Apple most recent annual revenue 2025 total net sales fiscal year 2025 annual report
answer: Apple's fiscal 2025 revenue was $416.2 billion, a 6% increase from the previous year, driven by strong iPhone and Services sales. This record revenue marks the highest in the company's history.
